choices.label: Saddam Hussein begins the Anfal genocide against Kurds and Assyrians in northern Iraq.
Iran hostage crisis: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini states that Iran's parliament will decide the fate of the American embassy hostages.

events_used.text: Saddam Hussein begins the Anfal genocide against Kurds and Assyrians in northern Iraq.
